title: Marshlaw's Better End
description: This Mod Inproves Minecraft End Dimension
body: ![Marshlaw Better End](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/752d7d137d22de33279437cf56fe204c1952e7fd.png) ## This mod **improve** the end dimension By adding a special weapons, New Mechanics / Structures / Biomes and More ... ### About this mod This mod adds **300** Mod Elements in total **Weapons** - Voided trident - Void trident - Endstone katana - Dragon katana - Endstone bow - Dragon Scale bow - Astrea ( Special Ability ) - Opal Spear - Enderium Spear - Obsidian Spear **Armor ( More in Future !)** - Dragon Scale Armor - Endium Armor **Blocks** - New type of wood (3) - Opal Ore - Infested Endstone - Enderium Ore **Utility** - Orb of Levitation - Opal Tools ( More in Future ! ) - Enderium Tools - Obsidian Tools - Fishig Rods - Totem of Wind - Void apple - Void cod - Any Portable Shulker box - Voided Slime Block ( Speed Block ) - Endium Template **Ores & Powders** - Enderium Shard - Enderium Dust - Pulverized Enderium Dust - Opal - Reinforced Opal - Shulker Membrane - Shulker Dust - Pulverized Shulker Dust - Chunk of Endstone - Endstone Ingot - Endstone Nugget - Dragon Scale **Biomes** - Voided lands ![Voided Lands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e135d180e694145096ec274db1fbfa7ecea4434f.png) - Warped Forest ![Warped Garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c50423599f8cf57546f278eca4d43b95ba04427d.png) ![Shadow Meltdown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/051e77331cfb300ec2ee31098065e50d1fa3d252.png) This mod add Portable Shulker Box What is Portable Shulker Box? Portable Shulker Box is Shulker Box that has more Slots and You dont need to open it! ### **Improve mod by donating & Sponsoring Me!** https://buymeacoffee.com/marshlaw Thanks For Reading Please report any bugs
